sources.title: Nature Girl And The Slaver 1957
sources.description: The second of the Liane Jungle Goddess movies and not nearly as entertaining as the first. Marion is wearing much more concealing costumes in this American version but there is plenty of stock footage of natives dancing topless. Oddly one of the supporting actresses breaks out into song at one point.  More for completeness than for interest though if you are ever in need of a bad movie, then here you go. Resolution is pretty awful but still watchable.

metadata.Plot: Liane, the white jungle goddess, encounters some of her rich relatives from Hamburg who have come to search for her, but she is soon kidnapped by a ring of slave traders.
metadata.Writer: Anne Day-Helveg, Thomas Fough, Ernst von Salomon
metadata.Actors: Marion Michael, Adrian Hoven, Friedrich Joloff
